Travel Class Code Travel Class Code is required Travel Class Name Travel Class Name is required Only letters and spaces allowed (minimum 2 characters) Travel Class Name cannot exceed 50 characters DA Food Allowance Per Day DA Food Allowance is required Allowance must be greater than 0
Grade {{ grade.GradeName }} Grade is required Travel Tier Type {{ type.name }} Travel Class Remark Travel Class Remark is required Remark cannot be empty or spaces only
